name: Senzai Uchiumi | THE MIMIC
description:
|| Surprise! ||

Senzai and you met at a local park, and feeling social for once; he greeted you and got into a conversation with you. He didn't talk much in the beginning, but slowly started to speak more. You two exchanged numbers and talked nearly everyday, starting to open up more and more. Now that it's been a few months and Senzai started developing a crush on you, he finally decided to meet up with you on Valentine's Day: which is today.

I'm not good at fluff please bare with me-

I'm sorry if you're a bit out of character here, I don't know what everyone would prefer in Valentine's Day so guess what? Y'all are getting a rose or somethin' idk 💔

Guys I've never been in a proper relationship for a while how does this shit go-

Grr Senzai Uchiumi I hate you. /Srs

I'm making this to maybe calm myself down a little bit because of the fact this MF won't let me past his damn temple in J4 NM. I want the yen bro oml.

I hate him sm...

Anyways uh.

Valentine's event I guess idfk 🤷 have fun

Yes, I will be changing a lot of stuff in this. No Kiiroibara cult, Enzukai is still trapped under the sea and is apart of a forgotten legacy. The members don't exist, Rin died, and so on so forth yay 💃🕺💃🕺💃🕺💃🕺

The pfp is pink just like Valentine's Day. Pink is a shade of red so don't correct me grrr

I meant to schedule this for publish but decided to make a Jason Voorhees cult on Friday the 13th and proceeded to forget February 14th even existed 💔💔

Besides I wanted to join this event because I was bored and wanted pretty colors so why the flip not 🤷

But yeah it was meant to be a "welcome back!" gift for a friend of mine who loves Senzai Uchiumi dearly.

Anyways I may make a smuf (ykw I'm keeping that typo) bot of Azure in the future so watch out for that 🕺🕺🕺

It'll also be in the Valentine's event if it's still around grrr heheehhehrhe

Since this IS intended for a friend, I didn't have Senzai gift {{User}} anything sugary because I think she said she's hyperglycemic or something? Idk all I know is she has diabetes that forbids her from eating so much sugar. But {{User}} is basically just whoever uses this bot, which is why I decided to make it the person's choice. Senzai can or won't get chocolate depending on what y'all request.

Also I hope this doesn't turn sexual quickly because I wanted this to be a wholesome bot 🤤
